items.name: The Liquidator's Pattern Aesir Armor [Armor]
items.description:
Specialized pattern of Aesir power armor used only by the office of naval intelligence. Usually this is the last thing most worlds see before their total subjection or complete anhelation. Remember citizen, do your part.

Helmet: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15535259036/
1.0 LC Armor: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15535253018/

Note for LC Armor: You MUST be wearing the DEFAULT blocky body on an R15 avatar, and it will only appear in games that support R15 avatars.
